title: dense post-workout roast Turkish lamb Pilaf
description: resinous, crunchy, post-workout Turkish dish featuring ground cinnamon, roast, halal-friendly. Perfect after a workout to replenish energy and satisfy hunger.

ingredients.name: boneless lamb shoulder or neck, cut into 1-inch pieces
ingredients.notes: halal-friendly. If using neck, trim excess fat.

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: use lamb or beef broth for added flavor

instructions: in a large paella pan or skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the chopped carrot and cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
add the lamb pieces and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes, breaking them up with a spoon as they cook.
add the Turkish rice, water, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine, then bring to a boil.
reduce the heat to low, cover the pan with a tight-fitting lid, and transfer it to the preheated oven.
bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
remove the pan from the oven and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes.
fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped parsley.
